description: A list of commerce warehouses generated by AI.

warehouses.description: An array of generated warehouse objects.

city.description: The city where the warehouse is located.

country.description: The two-letter country code for the warehouse's location.

description.description: The localized description of the warehouse.

latitude.description: The latitude of the warehouse's location.

longitude.description: The longitude of the warehouse's location.

name.description: The localized name of the warehouse.

region.description: The two-letter region or state code for the warehouse's location.

street1.description: The first line of the street address.

zip.description: The postal code for the warehouse's location.

title: WarehouseList
